section.heading: Federal risk and authorization management program

content.p: There is established within the General Services Administration the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program. The Administrator, subject to section 3614, shall establish a Government-wide program that provides a standardized, reusable approach to security assessment and authorization for cloud computing products and services that process unclassified information used by agencies.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 117–263, div. E, title LIX, § 5921(b), Dec. 23, 2022, 136 Stat. 3450.)

note.heading: Repeal of Section
note.p: For repeal of section by section 5921(d)(1) of Pub. L. 117–263, see Effective Date of Repeal note below.

note.heading: Effective Date of Repeal
note.p: Pub. L. 117–263, div. E, title LIX, § 5921(d)(1), Dec. 23, 2022, 136 Stat. 3458, provided that the repeal of this section is effective on the date that is 5 years after Dec. 23, 2022.

note.heading: Construction
note.p: For rule of construction regarding section 5921 of Pub. L. 117–263, see section 5921(e) of Pub. L. 117–263, set out as a note under section 3607 of this title.
